summary: REQ-1 is implemented in ZurichCouplesLandingPage.tsx using a useEffect-based injection pattern. The gtag.js script with ID G-NQHZEVRPBL is loaded, window.dataLayer is initialized, and gtag('config', 'G-NQHZEVRPBL') is called. Cleanup on unmount is included. The implementation deviates slightly from the Basel pattern (which uses React Helmet) by using manual DOM manipulation via useEffect, but functionally meets all acceptance criteria. No other pages are modified to include this tag.
